---
name: Example code issue
about: Report an issue with the example robot code under the examples/ directory
title: ''
labels: examples
assignees: ''
---

**Which example?**
Include the path to the example directory and relevant file(s).
e.g. Stage 1a CTRE `src/main/java/first/robot/opmode/MyTeleop.java`

**What's wrong?**
A clear and concise description of the bug or issue in the code.

**Expected behavior**
What the code should do instead.

**Steps to reproduce**
How to see the problem (e.g. compile commands, copy-paste the snippet, etc.).

**Suggested fix (optional)**
If you have an idea for how to fix it, include it here.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, screenshots, or build output logs here.
